title: Aiouea amplexicaulis
taxonomy: Aiouea amplexicaulis is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae. It is a type of evergreen tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Within the Lauraceae family, Aiouea amplexicaulis is classified as a member of the genus Aiouea. The exact classification hierarchy of Aiouea amplexicaulis includes it being a part of the family Lauraceae, order Laurales, and class Magnoliopsida. Further classification details may vary depending on the specific botanical source.
